metadata.description: hotwire-rails-toolkit — skills + runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps shipping to web/PWA, iOS, and Android.

plugins.name: hotwire-rails-toolkit
plugins.description: Seven verified skills with CI-runnable linters: Hotwire Native bridge + path config, Rails 7→8 upgrade (LazyRouteSet flake detector), Turbo 8 morphing, targeted Turbo Streams (eavesdrop linter), token-backed session auth (security audit), and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.
